summary: A rectangular fortified courtyard with four tall corner towers and crenellated low walls. The interior yard is filled with dark nether-type flooring and a central raised pale platform with glow. Towers have overhanging layered roofs and small glass windows. Decorative cobble buttresses and a stone-slab coping run along the exterior base of the walls.

shape.overall_form: rectangular walled enclosure with four corner towers and open interior courtyard
shape.symmetry: near fourfold (rotational) symmetry around center, mirrored on long sides

elements: four corner towers with overhanging layered flat roofs
low surrounding curtain walls with stepped cobble supports
interior flat dark floor with central raised pale platform and glowstone
small glass windows set in towers and walls
stone slab / smooth stone coping around tower roofs and wall tops
rebuild_hints: Build a rectangular outer wall with two taller towers on one long side and two matching towers on the opposite long side (corners). Towers are thick (3x3 or 4x4) and rise ~12-14 blocks above ground.

Use darker stonebrick for towers; add small recessed glass windows in vertical pattern. Cap towers with a layered flat roof: dark nether-brick top inset and smooth stone slab border overhanging by 1 block.
Construct low curtain walls between towers of stonebrick with horizontal cobblestone decorative bands and cobblestone protruding blocks along the base as buttresses spaced evenly.
Fill interior floor with dark nether-like material and place a centered raised pale 5x5-ish platform with a glowstone block on top.
Add a thin horizontal trim (dark band) under the top coping of the walls matching the roof in color.
uncertainties: Exact block types: nether_brick vs another dark red/dark block for courtyard floor and roof inset is inferred but not certain.
Precise internal layout and door/entrance placement are not visible in all views; main entrance location uncertain.
Exact footprint dimensions and tower thickness are estimated from images; on-ground measurement may differ by a few blocks.
